title: pneumonanthe media
intro: Pneumonanthe media, also known as Lungwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in iridoid glycosides, which have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving lung function. Pneumonanthe media can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in folk medicine to alleviate respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
